item.title: Deccan Health Care Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Underperformance
item.description: Deccan Health Care Ltd’s stock plunged to a new all-time low of Rs.12.91 on 5 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The healthcare services company has experienced sustained underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers, reflecting persistent challenges in its financial metrics and valuation. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: AMS Polymers Ltd Hits All-Time High at Rs.29.82, Marking a Significant Milestone
item.description: AMS Polymers Ltd, a key player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has reached a new all-time high of Rs.29.82, reflecting a robust performance that has propelled the stock to unprecedented levels. This milestone underscores the company’s sustained momentum amid a challenging market environment. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Precision Wires India Ltd Hits All-Time High at Rs 332.65, Marking Remarkable Growth
item.description: Precision Wires India Ltd has reached a new all-time high of Rs 332.65, underscoring its robust performance and sustained growth within the industrial products sector. This milestone reflects the company’s strong fundamentals and consistent market outperformance over multiple time horizons. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd Opens with Strong Gap Up, Reflecting Positive Market Sentiment
item.description: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd witnessed a significant gap up at market open on 5 Mar 2026, surging by 16.58% from its previous close. This strong start reflects positive market sentiment following a period of consecutive declines, with the stock outperforming its sector and broader indices amid heightened volatility. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: D.P. Abhushan Ltd Opens Strong with 6.81% Gap Up on 5 Mar 2026
item.description: D.P. Abhushan Ltd, a player in the Gems, Jewellery And Watches sector, commenced trading today with a notable gap up, opening 6.81% higher than its previous close. This strong start follows a three-day decline and signals a shift in market dynamics, despite the stock still trading below its key moving averages and maintaining a Sell mojo grade. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Ramky Infrastructure Ltd Opens with Strong Gap Up, Reflecting Positive Market Sentiment
item.description: Ramky Infrastructure Ltd commenced trading on 5 Mar 2026 with a significant gap up, opening 5.29% higher than its previous close. This strong start underscores a shift in market sentiment, with the stock outperforming its sector and broader indices amid heightened volatility and a reversal after a four-day decline. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Nalwa Sons Investments Ltd Opens Strong with Significant Gap Up on 5.85% Gain
item.description: Nalwa Sons Investments Ltd commenced trading today with a significant gap up, opening 5.85% higher than its previous close, signalling a robust start and positive market sentiment despite the stock’s prevailing technical challenges and bearish medium-term indicators. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd has reached an all-time low, closing just 0.41% above its 52-week low of ₹244, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock has underperformed its sector and major indices consistently, reflecting a challenging period for the company within the Iron & Steel Products industry. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: AWFIS Space Solutions Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: AWFIS Space Solutions Ltd, a key player in the Diversified Commercial Services sector, has recorded a new all-time low of Rs.270.15, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock’s performance over recent months highlights a sustained downward trajectory, reflecting a complex interplay of financial metrics and market conditions. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: GPT Healthcare Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of GPT Healthcare Ltd have declined to an all-time low, reflecting sustained underperformance across multiple time frames and financial metrics. The hospital sector stock has witnessed a steady erosion in value, now trading just 0.41% above its 52-week low of ₹120.25, signalling a challenging period for the company and its shareholders. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Digidrive Distributors Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Digidrive Distributors Ltd, a player in the E-Retail/ E-Commerce sector, plunged to a new all-time low of Rs.19.61 on 5 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended decline. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices consistently over multiple time frames, reflecting persistent pressures on its market valuation and financial metrics. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Vedant Fashions Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Underperformance
item.description: Vedant Fashions Ltd has reached an all-time low, closing just 0.94% above its 52-week low of ₹368.4, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock’s recent performance highlights persistent challenges within the garments and apparels sector, with the company continuing to lag behind key market benchmarks and peers. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: AGS Transact Technologies Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: AGS Transact Technologies Ltd, a player in the Financial Technology sector, has reached an all-time low in its stock price, reflecting a sustained period of decline and deteriorating financial metrics. The stock’s recent performance underscores significant challenges faced by the company, with returns sharply lagging behind benchmark indices and sector peers. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Dreamfolks Services Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Dreamfolks Services Ltd, a player in the transport infrastructure sector, has reached a new all-time low of Rs.73.56, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind key benchmarks, reflecting a challenging period for the company and its shareholders. Time: 38 minutes ago

item.title: G G Engineering Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of G G Engineering Ltd, a player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, have fallen to an all-time low, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance and financial strain. The stock closed just 2.13% above its 52-week low of ₹0.46, underscoring the severity of its decline amid broader market fluctuations. Time: 38 minutes ago

item.title: Pashupati Cotspin Ltd Stock Hits All-Time High at Rs.1101.75
item.description: Pashupati Cotspin Ltd has reached an all-time high of Rs.1101.75 today, underscoring a remarkable phase of performance within the Garments & Apparels sector. This milestone reflects the company’s sustained upward momentum and notable outperformance relative to its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 38 minutes ago

item.title: Murae Organisor Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Murae Organisor Ltd, a player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, has reached an all-time low in its stock price, reflecting a sustained period of decline despite recent positive earnings reports. The stock closed just 4.76% above its 52-week low of Rs 0.20, underscoring the severity of its valuation slump amid broader market pressures. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: SBC Exports Ltd Stock Hits All-Time High, Marking a Remarkable Growth Trajectory
item.description: SBC Exports Ltd, a key player in the Garments & Apparels sector, has reached an all-time high in its stock price, underscoring a period of sustained growth and robust market performance. This milestone reflects the company’s strong fundamentals and impressive returns over multiple time horizons. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Shangar Decor Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Shangar Decor Ltd have declined to an all-time low, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s prolonged downward trajectory. The company’s equity closed just 4% above its 52-week low of ₹0.24, reflecting sustained pressure amid deteriorating financial metrics and subdued market sentiment within the Diversified Commercial Services sector. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Srestha Finvest Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Srestha Finvest Ltd, a Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC), has reached an all-time low share price, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance and financial contraction. The stock closed just 3.85% above its 52-week low of ₹0.25, marking a significant milestone in its downward trajectory amid challenging market conditions and deteriorating financial metrics. Time: 40 minutes ago
